name: claude-code-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code plugin collection for TypeScript CLI development workflows

plugins.name: cli-builder
plugins.description: TypeScript CLI project scaffolding and code style enforcement. Interactively generates monorepo projects (pnpm + Commander + Zod + Chalk 5.x + tsup + Vitest + @clack/prompts), validates code conventions against coding-plans-statusline standards, and generates individual command templates with proper structure.

skills.name: cli-create
skills.description: Interactive CLI project creation — guides users through project configuration and generates complete monorepo scaffolds with TypeScript ESM, Commander, Zod, Chalk, and full tooling (ESLint, Prettier, Husky, Changesets)

skills.name: cli-check
skills.description: Code style validation — checks existing TypeScript CLI projects against coding-plans-statusline conventions, reports ESM compliance, dependency audit, barrel exports, test naming, and more

skills.name: cli-add-command
skills.description: Command template generation — creates individual command files with Commander definition, Zod validation schema, Chalk output, barrel exports, and test stubs

agents.name: cli-validator
agents.description: Automatic code compliance checker — validates generated code against conventions after scaffolding or modification, generates structured reports with severity-graded findings

hooks: PostToolUse (Write/Edit) — checks .ts files for convention violations on save
SubagentStop — verifies generated code follows conventions after subagent execution
